mapper.sql: id, order_no, student_id, repairer_id, dorm_building, room_no, category, title, description, image_urls, contact_phone, status, reject_reason, assigned_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

o.id, o.order_no, o.title, o.dorm_building, o.room_no, o.category, o.status, o.description, o.image_urls, o.contact_phone, o.reject_reason, o.created_at, s.real_name AS student_name, r.real_name AS repairer_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM repair_orders WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM repair_orders o JOIN users s ON s.id = o.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON r.id = o.repairer_id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM repair_orders o JOIN users s ON s.id = o.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON r.id = o.repairer_id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_orders o JOIN users s ON s.id = o.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON r.id = o.repairer_id WHERE
SELECT FROM repair_orders o JOIN users s ON s.id = o.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON r.id = o.repairer_id WHERE ORDER BY o.created_at DESC, o.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_orders SET dorm_building = #{dormBuilding}, room_no = #{roomNo}, category = #{category}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_urls = #{imageUrls}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE repair_orders SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE repair_orders SET status = #{status}, repairer_id = #{repairerId}, assigned_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE repair_orders SET status = #{status}, completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT dorm_building FROM repair_orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dorm_building
